'''''Shockwave''''' was a [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] built at [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk]]'s secret [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]].<ref name="DS" />

==Characteristics==
''Shockwave'' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> that was heavily outfitted with high-energy weapons. It was capable of obliterating a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in a single volley.<ref name="DS" />

==History==
Serving as Harrsk' [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], ''Shockwave'' was eventually ravaged and destroyed by [[Treuten Teradoc]]'s fleet while Harrsk was discussing unification with Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]. The destruction of the ''Shockwave'' would prove a pivotal moment as Admiral Daala's friend, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kratas]], was touring the vessel at the time, and his death would be one of the major factors moving Daala to revenge herself upon the Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|Warlords]] by seeking their deaths in order to install herself as the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the Empire's remnants.<ref name="DS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]
